text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Three friends assembled for the new year! A triple
first shrine visit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I forgot to bring coins for my offering!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I can lend you some, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and her friends are starting their
senior year at last. I'm accompanying the three of
them for their first shrine visit of the new year.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. The arrow that person's holding is a
hamaya, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I heard a story about those things!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
One arrow breaks easily, but three arrows
together can break your enemy!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Three arrows? Perhaps you're thinking of Mori's
lesson of the three arrows. But I think you might
be misunderstanding part of it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What's this three arrow business?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Basically, if the three of us work together, we can
even beat Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see! We're stronger together than on our
own! Like a power up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, it seems as though the three
of them have the same opponent to overcome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang, clang!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can run with Suzuka and give a
performance everyone will talk about!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I swear to dedicate myself to my training so I can
surpass Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I wanna beat Suzuka! I won't lose this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each racer phrases it differently, but they all have
one goal.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, after parting with Special Week and Grass
Wonder...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. My first race of the new year is the
Takarazuka Kinen, right? Will Suzuka be running
there?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right! In that case, I gotta be fearless and
resolute in my training until then!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, Spe, and Grass are all great rivals, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think we should try to train like for
our New Year's training session?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she wants to replicate one of their training
styles. It's true that all three of them have their
strong points.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The energetic Special Week. The intelligent Grass
Wonder. The enigmatic Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to try to imitate one of them,
maybe we should go with...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, so you think I should train like Spe?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In that case, there's only one thing that comes to
mind!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe was born in Hokkaido, and she's real good at
farming! Workin' in the fields has gotta be great
exercise!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Pull out some carrots, shake off the dirt, and
then—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nom! Munch, munch! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Spe always gives 'em a taste!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That was one delicious carrot. I'm havin' another! I
can eat as many as I want guilt-free since I'm bein'
Spe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa eats every carrot in sight, and
seems to have recovered a ton of energy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! I don't eat that much!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, so you think I should train like Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I remember Suzuka told me once that she wants
to see a view where there's no one else but her.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna try to run and find a place just
like that! See ya later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's no one here at the beach in the offseason.
It's empty and beautiful... but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm so lonely! This isn't for me at all! Traaaineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa comes running back just as
quickly as she left. Her experience enduring
loneliness has helped her grow.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Training like G-Grass? I know her training routine
well enough that... Well...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It'll be tough, but if you think it's a good idea...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Today... I'm gonna study how to run. Grass
doesn't skimp on running or studying.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No matter how boring it gets, it's important that I
stay cool. Uuugh. I really want to run, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emulating Grass Wonder, she patiently endures a
proper study session and seems to learn many
new ways to approach running.
